title: helianthemum astylum
intro: Helianthemum astylum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. Rockrose is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum astylum can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
